goal: Promote graph/RAG citation, navigation, stale-source lint, and knowledge-surface cases only when adapters emit comparable evidence-linked outputs while preserving typed non-pass outcomes.

scenario_outcomes.required_output: Returned reference chunks must include generated document ids, chunk ids, content, and document metadata mapped to benchmark evidence ids.
scenario_outcomes.claim_boundary: No RAGFlow citation quality or ELF-over-RAGFlow claim is allowed.

scenario_outcomes.required_output: Context/source export must expose generated file paths, snippets, or references mapped to evidence ids.
scenario_outcomes.claim_boundary: No LightRAG graph/RAG quality claim is allowed until source references map to generated evidence.

scenario_outcomes.required_output: Output tables must map documents, text units, communities, reports, entities, and relationships to generated evidence ids.
scenario_outcomes.claim_boundary: No GraphRAG citation, synthesis, or navigation claim is allowed without mapped output tables.

scenario_outcomes.required_output: Current and historical graph facts must carry validity windows and evidence ids.
scenario_outcomes.claim_boundary: Graphiti/Zep remains the temporal-validity reference; no ELF superiority claim is allowed.

scenario_outcomes.required_output: graph.json, source-location sections, unsupported-claim lint, and stale-source lint must all be scored.
scenario_outcomes.claim_boundary: graphify has evidence-linked output but remains wrong_result; do not convert this into an ELF win.

scenario_outcomes.required_output: Contained page generation must emit cited sections plus stale-source and unsupported-claim lint.
scenario_outcomes.claim_boundary: llm-wiki remains a reference workflow until a contained materializer exists.

scenario_outcomes.required_output: Docker-local brain repository import must emit compiled-truth or timeline pages with source evidence.
scenario_outcomes.claim_boundary: gbrain remains blocked until setup/export readback is proven.

improved: The fresh June 19 report records graphify evidence-linked output and typed blockers in a checked-in XY-985 companion.
unchanged: No graph/RAG scenario moved to pass.
RAGFlow, GraphRAG, and Graphiti/Zep remain blocked.
llm-wiki remains not_encoded and gbrain remains blocked.

allowed: The representative graph/RAG command is reproducible and emits typed non-pass outcomes.
graphify emits evidence-linked graph/report output but remains wrong_result.
The comparison status is unchanged relative to XY-955.
not_allowed: Do not claim graph/RAG parity or broad graph-navigation quality.
Do not convert research gates, tiny smokes, blocked setup, incomplete output, or graphify wrong_result into a win.
Do not use private providers, hosted services, or unrecorded credentials for this lane.

next_optimization_direction.non_goal: Do not implement broad ELF graph/RAG product features in this benchmark/report lane.
